title: Egypt unveils a striking trove of ancient artifacts as the country tries to boost tourism industry
description: CAIRO — Archaeologists unearthed a set of ancient artifacts in Egypt including Pharaonic funerary furniture, remains of a Roman basilica and a marble head of Aphrodite, the ancient Greek goddess of love and beauty.

title: Inspired by Ancient Rome, this adventure game loved by 95% of players is 75% off on Steam
description: Deal | The Forgotten City is a narrative adventure game that takes place in Ancient Rome. Your goal is to solve a mystery to uncover the truth, but be careful, because some of your decisions can have serious consequences.

title: British Museum Draws Criticism for Postponing Lecture on “Ancient History of Israel and Judah”
description: The British Museum elected to postpone a Jewish Culture Month event that was scheduled to take place last Thursday, May 28th due to concerns that the talk—a lecture on Ancient Israel and Judah—might be disrupted by protests. “In recent days, we were informed that a significant proportion of registered attendees were individuals intending to deliberately [...]

title: First Complete Dinosaur Fossil Ever Found Finally Makes History
Ancient Pre-Gond Settlement Unearthed Near Chandrapur
description: Chandrapur: A lost ancient settlement believed to be one of the earliest habitations linked to present-day Chandrapur has been identified near the con.
